title: rosa indica var. noisettiana
intro: Rosa indica var. noisettiana, also known as the Noisette rose, is a hybrid rose plant derived from the species Rosa indica and Rosa moschata. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin irritations, and fever. The health benefits of Rosa indica var. noisettiana include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of digestive issues and respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
